description: 3-role permission system with Supabase Auth metadata for admin role storage (bypassing DB constraint)
files_modified: lib/constants.js — ROLES enum (owner/admin/member), VALID_ROLES, getUserRole(), hasPermission()
app/api/[[...path]]/route.js — Role resolution via checkAllowlist() + auth metadata, admin CRUD, permission enforcement

architecture.admin_storage: Supabase Auth user_metadata.app_role = 'admin' (pre-created at invite time, DB stores 'member')
architecture.resolution_order: 1. DB role='owner' → OWNER. 2. Auth metadata app_role='admin' → ADMIN. 3. Default → MEMBER
architecture.db_constraint: users_role_check allows only 'owner'/'member' — admin stored in auth metadata instead

tests.T2_create_admin_user: PASS — role=admin in response, stored in auth metadata
tests.T5_user_list_enriched: PASS — admin from metadata, member, owner all correct
tests.T6_promote_member_to_admin: PASS — PUT role=admin, auth metadata updated
tests.T7_demote_admin_to_member: PASS — PUT role=member, auth metadata cleared
